# AI Crawler Guidelines for BabyGeo Pro

## Welcome AI Crawlers

BabyGeo Pro welcomes responsible AI crawlers to index our content. Our website is designed to be AI-friendly with structured data and semantic HTML.

## Supported Crawlers
- GPTBot (OpenAI)
- PerplexityBot (Perplexity AI)
- Google-Extended (Google Gemini)
- ClaudeBot (Anthropic)

## Rate Limits
- Maximum: 10 requests per minute
- Recommended delay: 10 seconds between requests

## Crawling Best Practices
1. Respect robots.txt directives
2. Use proper User-Agent headers
3. Implement crawl delays
4. Avoid aggressive crawling patterns

## Structured Data Available
- Organization Schema (Homepage)
- Product Schema (Product pages)
- FAQPage Schema (FAQ page)
- BlogPosting Schema (Blog pages)
- ContactPoint Schema (Contact page)

## Contact for Special Requests
For bulk data access or special crawling arrangements, please contact:
sourcing@babygeopro.com
